per_outcome.operationalization: Average of evaluator ratings on three components (novel, original, rare) using a multi-item index with Cronbach's α = 0.92
Average of evaluator ratings on three components (appropriate for audience, feasible to develop, publishable) with Cronbach's α = 0.89
Reader evaluations of how enjoyable the story was, measurement scale not specified
Reader evaluations of how well written the story was, measurement scale not specified
Reader evaluations of how boring the story was (reverse-coded quality measure), measurement scale not specified
Reader evaluations of how funny the story was, measurement scale not specified
Reader evaluations of whether the story had a surprising twist, measurement scale not specified
Reader evaluations of whether the story changed expectations for future stories; measures reader impact/learning rather than story quality itself
Cosine similarity of story embeddings to average embeddings of other stories in same condition, scaled 0-100; measures conformity/diversity, not quality
Cosine similarity of story embeddings to GenAI idea embeddings, scaled 0-100; measures AI influence/reliance, not output quality
